title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Behavioral Health (ABH) provides outpatient treatment services. 2045 Silverton Road NE Suite B Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Adults diagnosed with a serious and persistent mental illness and who experience functional impairments (i.e., history of inpatient psychiatric hospitalization, history of civil commitment, history of residential care, etc). Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 588-5351 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 588-5351 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
